next_steps: Orbital biopsy of the inflamed tissue (optic nerve sheath/intraconal fat)
Repeat serum IgG4 and assess total IgG levels
Serum soluble IL-2 receptor levels to evaluate for sarcoidosis or lymphoma
Close follow-up of systemic symptoms and repeat imaging to monitor response to corticosteroids
Consultation with rheumatology and ophthalmology for multidisciplinary management
